title: Communauté d'agglomération Terre de Provence
summary: Communauté d'agglomération Terre de Provence is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, covering the area around the town of Châteaurenard. It is located in the Bouches-du-Rhône department, in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, southeastern France. Created in 1996, its seat is in Eyragues. Its area is 265.9 km2. Its population was 59,775 in 2019.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération Terre de Provence is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, covering the area around the town of Châteaurenard. It is located in the Bouches-du-Rhône department, in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, southeastern France. Created in 1996, its seat is in Eyragues. Its area is 265.9 km2. Its population was 59,775 in 2019.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 13 communes:
